hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/generated/*) echo "STOP: Do not edit generated files in internal/generated/. Edit api/*.yaml and run make generate-openapi instead." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.go) if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -s -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'cd /Users/yosefgamble/github/vidra-core && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$STAGED" ]; then exit 0; fi; HAS_SECRETS=false; for f in $STAGED; do case "$f" in .env|.env.*|*credentials*|*secret*) echo "STOP: Refusing to commit potential secrets file: $f" >&2; HAS_SECRETS=true;; esac; done; if $HAS_SECRETS; then exit 2; fi; HAS_GO=false; for f in $STAGED; do case "$f" in *.go) HAS_GO=true; break;; esac; done; if $HAS_GO; then HAS_TEST=false; for f in $STAGED; do case "$f" in *_test.go) HAS_TEST=true; break;; esac; done; HAS_PROD=false; for f in $STAGED; do case "$f" in *_test.go) ;; *.go) HAS_PROD=true; break;; esac; done; if $HAS_PROD && ! $HAS_TEST; then echo "WARNING: Committing production Go code without test changes. Ensure tests exist for all changes." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
